name_cn:
NÉONOÉ Classic Series #M44022# Uninspected Version
▪️Size: 26*26*17.5cm▪️
As a classic masterpiece and a must-have entry-level piece,
the champagne carrier bag designed in 1932 meets contemporary trends,
transforming into a bucket bag embodying heritage beauty,
and is even called the "King of Classics".
It has a unique appeal across generations and ages,
with a large capacity design.
This is a classic king that can accompany you through prosperity,
and is also an essential bucket bag for every woman!
